vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (bầu không khí hoặc vẻ đẹp)
vocab.example: I love to sit on the shore and soak up the panoramic views before I even start taking photos.
Some of my best landscape shots were taken when I happened to stumble upon a hidden waterfall in the forest.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc
vocab.example: It's truly humbling to stand at the edge of a cliff and marvel at the vastness of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: phóng to, tập trung vào một chi tiết cụ thể
vocab.example: Even though it's a wide vista, I sometimes like to zoom in on a single lonely tree to create a more minimalist composition.

vocab.meaning: che khuất hoặc loại bỏ (những yếu tố gây nhiễu)
vocab.example: I often have to use a specific lens to block out the surrounding construction sites and focus purely on the natural scenery.
The golden sunlight at dusk really sets off the vibrant colors of the autumn leaves.

vocab.meaning: nhìn ra phía xa (từ một vị trí cao)
vocab.example: My favorite spot is a small balcony that looks out over the entire valley, especially during the misty mornings.

vocab.meaning: lên kế hoạch chi tiết (lộ trình đi săn ảnh)
vocab.example: Before my trip to Iceland, I spent weeks mapping out the best vantage points for landscape photography.
Whenever I see a dramatic sky, I simply can't pass up the opportunity to pull over and snap a few frames.

vocab.meaning: hòa hợp, hòa lẫn vào (để không làm phiền cảnh vật)
vocab.example: When photographing wildlife within a landscape, I try to wear neutral colors to blend in with the environment.
